category_sources: Official GNOME Apps page describes Disk Usage Analyzer as scanning folders, storage devices, and online accounts to show disk usage.
source_facts.description says Baobab is the GNOME disk usage analyzer.
display_name_sources: Official GNOME Apps page title is Disk Usage Analyzer.
source_facts.homepage points to the official Baobab app page.
docs_sources: Official GNOME Apps page is the best official user-facing documentation surface found for Baobab.
repo_sources: GitHub GNOME/baobab page identifies itself as a read-only mirror of https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/baobab.
Official GNOME Apps page links feedback/issues to gitlab.gnome.org for the app.
tags_sources: Official GNOME Apps page describes folder, storage device, and disk-space scanning.
source_facts.description identifies GNOME disk usage analysis.
